nasb.text: Then one of the four living creatures gave to the seven angels seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God, who lives forever and ever.

esv.text: And one of the four living creatures gave to the seven angels seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God who lives forever and ever,

cnv.text: 四個活物中有一個，把盛滿了活到永永遠遠之　神的烈怒的七個金碗，交給了那七位天使。

ccb.text: 四个活物中的一个将七只金碗分别交给七位天使，碗中盛满了永活上帝的烈怒。

csbs.text: 四个活物中有一个把七个金碗交给了那七位天使，碗里盛满了活到永永远远之神的愤怒。
